items.stem: For phase 6, what is the strongest reason to use the source 'our brands blantons single barrel blantons straight from the barrel' in an operations/process lesson update?

options.text: It mostly improves brand storytelling but not technical execution.
It is primarily useful for unrelated cocktail pairing examples.
It can provide process or compliance evidence that improves operational decision quality.
It should only be used to replace all existing lesson citations.

items.explanation: Process and operations phases require actionable evidence linked to production or compliance choices.
